mainEntity.name: If I optimize my content for AI answers now, how long before I see any real impact?

acceptedAnswer.text:
Expect an initial impact in **6–12 weeks** for crawlable, well-structured pages, with more meaningful shifts in 3–6 months as AI systems re-train and update.

AI answer visibility depends on both technical fixes and how often major models refresh their knowledge and citations.

Key factors:
- Crawlability and indexing of updated pages
- Frequency of AI search platform updates
- Strength of signals: schema, internal links, external mentions
- Competitive landscape in your topic area

Plan for a phased timeline: fix technical and structure issues now, monitor AI answers monthly, and refine content blocks as you see what gets cited.

Think of AEO as an ongoing optimization cycle, not a one-time project.
acceptedAnswer.description: Most businesses see early changes in AI answer visibility within **6–12 weeks**, with stronger, more stable impact around the 3–6 month mark. It depends on crawlability, how often AI platforms refresh their data, and how competitive your topics are.
